_comment: Tier-2 Layer-F companion: inverted-gate fixture. Layer F caught on 2026-06-01 that the catalog's shipped Stokes templates for skfem/ngsolve/fenics all FAIL end-to-end. Rather than block Layer F's main gate, this companion fixture INVERTS the semantics: it PASSES while the 3 templates are broken-as-expected, and FAILS the moment the catalog improves (signaling that the row should move from this tracker to the main Layer F gate). Tracked failure modes: skfem stokes::2d ships homogeneous BC + missing pressure pin → ValueError from condense (task #26); ngsolve stokes lacks free.Clear(V.ndof) → MKL Pardiso phase-33 zero pivot (task #27); fenics stokes XDMFFile.write_function fails on sol.sub(0).collapse() (task #28). The fixture also asserts the FAILURE MODE matches the documented token — a partial fix that changes the error class but doesn't fully repair the template trips wrong_failure_mode_count. Verified 2026-06-01: 3 correct failures.
